data.title: Senate Cancels Market Structure Act Meeting Amid Coinbase Controversy
data.description:
U. S. Senate cancels Market Structure Act meeting; Coinbase withdraws support amid controversy.
source: https://coincu.com/news/senate-cancels-market-act-meeting/

data.title: Morpho Discord Server to Become Read-Only for Enhanced Security
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Morpho team member albist announced on Discord that the Morpho Discord server will switch to read-only mode starting February 1. To provide more secure and reliable support services, all official support and contact channels have been consolidated into the Morpho help page and its chat box.

Morpho co-founder Merlin Egalite commented that Discord is rife with scammers. Despite strict monitoring and security measures, users still face phishing attacks when seeking answers. Recently, the team tested Intercom, which has simplified support tasks with features like instant translation, a help center, AI support bots, and ticket management.

data.title: AI and GPU infrastructure project AGGX raises $2 million in strategic funding.
data.description: AGGX (Adaptive GPU Mesh Sharding), a next-generation GPU and AI computing infrastructure project, announced that it has raised a total of $2 million in its ongoing strategic funding round. This round was led by Ternary LEC Fund, EF Investment & Partners, Spacebar Venture, and two other strategic investors. AGGX's core team comprises AI PhDs and university professors from the United States. Their innovative GPU sharding solution can virtualize a single GPU into more than 30 on-chain nodes, providing scalable, low-latency computing services for GPU-intensive workloads in the Web2 and Web3 ecosystems while improving cost efficiency.

data.title: Robinhood CEO: The U.S. should take a leading role in crypto policy and support the passage of the Market Structure Act.
data.description: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev tweeted that staking is one of the most in-demand features on the Robinhood App, but due to the current impasse, customers in four US states are still unable to use it. The stock token is available to EU customers but has not yet launched in the US market. He believes the US should take a leading role in crypto policy through legislation that protects consumers and unleashes innovation for everyone. He supports the efforts of Congress to pass the Market Structures Act, noting that while work remains, a path has been seen, and that he will assist the BankingGOP and Senate Banking in pushing the bill through.

data.title: Trump: Although Powell is facing an investigation, there are no plans to fire him for the time being.
data.description: US President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that despite the Justice Department's ongoing criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell, he currently has no plans to fire him, and that it is "too early" to determine what action he will ultimately take. When asked if he would attempt to remove Powell from his post, Trump told Reuters, "I don't have any such plans at the moment." When asked if the investigation gave him a reason to take action, Trump added, "Right now, we're taking a deferred approach with him, and we're looking at how to proceed next. But I can't go into details. It's too early to say." (Jinshi)

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks retreated across the board, with AI stocks falling over 3%, but BTC briefly broke through $97,000.
data.description: On January 15th, according to SoSoValue data, the entire cryptocurrency market saw a pullback. The AI ​​sector fell 3.29% in the past 24 hours. Within the sector, Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) fell 6.51%, while Render (RENDER) and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) fell 7.29% and 8.75% respectively. However, it's worth noting that Bitcoin (BTC) remained relatively resilient, rising 1.39% against the trend and briefly surpassing $97,000 during the session. Ethereum (ETH) fell 0.05%, remaining above $3,300. In other sectors, the Layer 1 sector fell 0.80% in the last 24 hours, with Zcash (ZEC) rising 4.38% within the sector; the DeFi sector fell 1.11%, but River (RIVER) rose 15.07%; the CeFi sector fell 1.17%, with Bitget Token (BGB) surging 2.29% intraday; the PayFi sector fell 1.40%, with Dash (DASH) bucking the trend and rising 37.95%; the Meme sector fell 2.16%, with Pump.fun (PUMP) rising 5.28%; the Layer 2 sector fell 2.27%, with Movement (MOVE) surging 21.31%; and the crypto sector indices reflecting historical sector performance showed that the ssiAI, ssiNFT, and ssiLayer2 indices fell 3.99%, 3.43%, and 2.77%, respectively.

data.title: The Senate Banking Committee cancels its market structure meeting due to the Coinbase incident.
data.description: Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett reported on the X platform that, given today's events with Coinbase, the Senate Banking Committee has decided to cancel its market restructuring meeting scheduled for tomorrow. It is unclear whether a new meeting date has been set. Previous news: Coinbase opposes the Senate crypto bill, potentially impacting the legislative process.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies Rally as Powell Warns of Political Pressure on Fed
data.description:
Bitcoin, Ethereum, and privacy coins rose sharply after Fed Chair Powell warned of political pressure, fueling safe-haven demand amid macroeconomic optimism.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/cryptocurrencies-rally-as-powell-warns-of-political-pressure-on-fed/

data.title: A whale withdrew 2,100 ETH from Binance and deposited it into Aave, currently showing a floating profit of approximately $840,000.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), address 58bro.eth withdrew 2100 ETH from Binance approximately 7 hours ago and subsequently deposited the assets into Aave. Data shows that this address has been accumulating ETH since the beginning of the year, currently holding approximately 5594.85 ETH, valued at approximately $17.77 million at current prices. Since January 2nd, its average withdrawal price for ETH has been approximately $3176.31. With the ETH price rebounding from $3054 to $3342, the current unrealized profit is approximately $840,000.

data.title: TD Cowen cuts Strategy Bitcoin price target to $440
data.description:
TD Cowen cut Strategy’s 12-month price target from $500 to $440 because issuing more shares will dilute Bitcoin per share.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/td-cowen-cuts-strategy-bitcoin-price-target/

data.title: Ethereum Staking Reaches Record High of 35.9 Million ETH
data.description: According to PANews, data from validatorqueue indicates that Ethereum staking has reached a historic peak of 35.9 million ETH, accounting for approximately 29.61% of the total ETH supply. Currently, the Ethereum PoS network has 160 ETH in the exit queue, with a waiting time of around four minutes for withdrawal. Meanwhile, 2,479,680 ETH are queued for entry, with an estimated activation delay of about 43 days and 1 hour.

data.title: Crypto Firms Rally Behind Senate Republicans' Crypto Bill
data.description:
Key crypto players back the Senate Republicans' bill, impacting DeFi and regulatory debates.
source: https://coincu.com/news/crypto-firms-back-senate-bill/

data.title: Base Co-founder: Base applications will focus on transactions as the core, serving multiple asset classes in the on-chain economy.
data.description: Base co-founder Jesse Pollak stated that Base is repositioning the Base App as "trading-first" to drive demand and distribution of on-chain assets and cover a wider range of asset types. He pointed out that the Base App aims to become the preferred application for users to participate in the on-chain economy, whether it's trading, using assets, or conducting other on-chain activities, all within the application.

data.title: Polygon Foundation: PIP-69 proposal launched; validator share tokens will be displayed as dPOL at a 1:1 ratio.
data.description: The Polygon Foundation announced on the X platform that the PIP-69 proposal is now officially live. This proposal displays validator share tokens as dPOL at a 1:1 ratio, aiming to improve wallet visibility and expand the utility of staked POL. dPOL is fully ERC-20 compliant, simplifying the creation of POL liquidity staking tokens (LSTs) and enhancing DeFi composability. Users who have staked POL will see these tokens in their wallets, which may display as dPOL, dPOL1, or dPOLa4, depending on the wallet.

data.title: SEC Concludes Investigation into Zcash Foundation Without Enforcement Action
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Zcash Foundation has announced that the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has concluded its investigation into the foundation and will not pursue any enforcement actions or require any changes. Previously, on August 31, 2023, the Zcash Foundation received a subpoena from the SEC related to an investigation titled 'Investigation into Certain Crypto Asset Issuances (SF-04569).'

data.title: ETHGas: The snapshot of Discord Interactive Points has been completed; the snapshot of the token airdrop will be taken on January 19th.
data.description: According to official news, the snapshot of ETHGas's interactive points on the Discord community has been completed, and the token airdrop snapshot will be taken on January 19th. Furthermore, due to the high demand for Gas IDs on the platform, users need to wait in a queue. If problems persist while waiting, users should retry repeatedly. Refreshing will not reset or affect the queue position.

data.title: Whale Sells WBTC Amid Market Fluctuations, Incurring Significant Losses
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on January 15, a major cryptocurrency investor, who previously purchased $263 million worth of WBTC and ETH using a revolving loan, sold 300 WBTC for 29.11 million USDT to repay debts after BTC surpassed $97,000. This sale resulted in a realized loss of $39.15 million due to buying at high prices and selling at lower ones.

In August 2025, the investor acquired 1,560 WBTC at $116,762 each, totaling approximately $182 million, and 18,517 ETH at $4,415 each, valued at around $81.75 million. As the market declined, the investor began selling off assets in November. All ETH holdings were sold at $3,049 each, resulting in a $25.29 million loss, while 560 WBTC were sold at $92,015 each, incurring a $13.86 million loss.

The investor still retains 1,000 WBTC, valued at approximately $96.81 million.

data.title: Ondo Transfers 25 Million ONDO Tokens to Exchanges
data.description: According to Foresight News, monitoring by Ember reveals that Ondo's multi-signature wallet has transferred 25 million ONDO tokens to several exchanges. The tokens are valued at approximately $10.19 million.
